receivedPermissions.description: can call newFinalizedState() to prove the latest HotShot state.
can authorize an upgrade, update the permissioned prover, disable permissioned prover mode and set the state history retention period.

entries.name: OpsTimelock

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: can authorize an upgrade, update the permissioned prover, disable permissioned prover mode and set the state history retention period.

entries.name: HotShotLightClient
